svg.title: Fusion neutronics solver roadmap — Phases 9 through 14
svg.desc: Six-phase roadmap showing P3 scattering, external benchmarking, performance layer, multi-zone geometry, advanced physics, and reactor-scale analysis

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 9 P3 scattering implementation')
g.text: Rank-2 and rank-3 angular moment tensors · σ_s2, σ_s3 matrices · direction-dependent Q(Ωₘ)

svg.text: Gate: P3 vs P1 delta < 0.5% on 3-group slab — reflective BC test passes

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 10 external benchmark verification')
g.text: SINBAD slab · pure absorber analytic · published TBR comparison · leakage spectrum check

svg.text: Gate: all benchmarks within 2% of reference · TBR within 5% of MCNP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 11 performance acceleration')
g.text: Numba JIT sweep kernel · parallel angle loop · memory layout · 50×50×50 target mesh

svg.text: Gate: 50×50×50, S8, G=3 solves in <60s on single CPU core · no physics regression

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 12 multi-zone geometry')
g.text: Material region map · zone-dependent XS · W first wall + Be multiplier + Li4SiO4 + He void

svg.text: Gate: TBR and heating fields physically stratified across material zones

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 13 advanced physics extensions')
g.text: Full NRT damage model · Be(n,2n) multiplier · upscattering · coupled multi-group DSA

svg.text: Gate: conservation holds with upscatter · NRT DPA integrated matches analytic estimate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 14 reactor-scale analysis capability')
g.text: ITER TBM geometry · parametric enrichment sweep · wall load map · design optimisation loop
